title: Highstreet World
description: Commerce-focused metaverse where players co-op through combat zones, social hubs, and brand worlds.
about: Highstreet World combines social exploration, co-op dungeon loops, and commerce-driven progression. I focused on scalable gameplay systems that support real-time multiplayer while keeping iteration speed high for live content drops.
features: Cross-surface play between web and VR
Live content updates with data-driven tuning

myWork.title: Gameplay Systems Architecture
myWork.description: Designed modular gameplay flow for quests, encounters, and progression loops with clear ownership boundaries.

myWork.title: Multiplayer Feature Delivery
myWork.description: Implemented real-time synced gameplay features and optimized state updates for stability under network variance.

title: 10 Tawla
description: Competitive backgammon with ranked matchmaking and social sessions.
about: 10 Tawla modernizes classic backgammon with competitive matchmaking, social lobbies, and ranked progression tuned for session-based mobile play.

myWork.title: Realtime Match Flow
myWork.description: Built turn sync, reconnect behavior, and match lifecycle events for robust online sessions.

myWork.title: Progression and Ranking
myWork.description: Implemented rating changes, leaderboard updates, and anti-abuse checks.

title: Sky Striders
description: Movement-first multiplayer game with ground and air traversal mastery.
about: Sky Striders emphasizes expressive movement and player skill expression with fast vertical traversal and dynamic mode objectives.

myWork.title: Core Movement Mechanics
myWork.description: Implemented acceleration, aerial control, and responsiveness tuning for high-skill traversal.

myWork.title: Online Gameplay Loop
myWork.description: Developed multiplayer gameplay rules and replication strategy for smooth competitive sessions.
